customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety. Kelly is self-motivated, single decision-maker, friend-referred, and booked without resistance. Her one unresolved conditional ('if that's true' re: no upfront cost) was never explicitly closed — she is enthusiastic but her enthusiasm rests on an unanchored claim. She is not skeptical, but she has not been given a reason to trust beyond the claim itself.
unresolved_concerns: No-upfront-cost claim confirmed verbally but never anchored to Ion's credentials or track record — Kelly's 'if that's true' at 01:40 was left open.
Kelly may expect an in-person design review ('drop by' framing at 06:44) rather than a phone call — closer should clarify the format at the start of the appointment.

kWh usage data from the verbal readback may contain transcription errors (Deepgram rendered several readings as date strings; March/January confusion noted at 06:28-06:36) — design team should verify against Kelly's actual bill before sizing the system.
sensitive_topics_raised: Prior door-to-door quotes in the $20-30K range — Kelly has a price anchor from previous solicitations and will be comparing against it.
Kelly was on vacation last month and flagged that her most recent bill is not representative — she is aware of the data quality issue and may ask about it.
exact_promises_rep_made: Design will be built out before the appointment.
A reminder text will be sent before Friday at 3PM.
Ion does a site survey before any install to confirm structural soundness.
The first meeting is preliminary — no commitment required, just to review the design and current incentives.
closer_should_know: Kelly sold herself before Pike said much — her friend's referral did the legitimacy work. Her one open thread is the 'if that's true' conditional on no upfront cost: she is enthusiastic but has not been given a concrete reason to trust the claim beyond Pike's confirmation. Open with a brief legitimacy anchor (Tesla-certified installer, Ion's track record, the neighbor installations visible on her street) before moving into the design — close that conditional early and her investment will be solid. Also confirm the appointment is a phone call, not a house visit, to avoid a format mismatch at the start.
